## Problem

Describe the user-visible problem or maintenance need.

## Changes

Summarize the implementation and any behavior or architecture decisions.

## Verification

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make test-install`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Manual Finder testing completed or not required
- [ ] Before-and-after benchmark attached or not required

List the exact tests, Finder views, item counts, macOS version, and Karabiner
version used when applicable.

## Documentation and safety

- [ ] Requirements and Decision Log updated or not required
- [ ] Public documentation updated or not required
- [ ] No personal paths, file names, clipboard contents, or unsanitized logs
- [ ] No dedicated idle process, polling, or telemetry introduced
